reference: Hi, sir. I have stones in both of my kidneys measuring around four-six millimeters. For the last two days, I have experienced some pain in my stomach on the lower right side. I have undergone an ultrasound, and it shows a tiny cyst in the parenchyma measuring approximately seven by three point six millimeters. Can you guide me on what the problem is?
text: Hi sir, I have stones in both of my kidneys measuring around 4-6 mm. For the last two days I have experienced some pain in my stomach on the lower right side. I have undergone an ultrasound and it shows a tiny cyst in the parenchyma measuring approximately 7 by 3.6 mm. Can you guide me on what the problem is?
